steps.title: Identify the angle pair formed at line q
steps.content: At the intersection of transversal $t$ with line $q$, the angles marked $x°$ and \$142°$ are adjacent angles that together form a straight line. Angles that form a linear pair are supplementary.

steps.title: Apply the linear pair property
steps.content: Two adjacent angles on a straight line must sum to \$180°$. Therefore: $$x + 142 = 180$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
